'''Nyo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Morado]] who lived during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and dreamed of being a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] born to parents on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Morado]] during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Nyo always dreamed of becoming a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] even though the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] had been dismantled and outlawed by the Empire the year before his birth. When he was old enough, Nyo took up [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] with his entire savings of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to raise money to buy a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], even though lightsabers were illegal under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] law. When Nyo got in over his head with a [[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] named [[Doune]], losing all but one credit, he was rescued by a gambler named [[Kinnin Vo-Shay]] who used the single credit to win more than 200,000 credits for Nyo to use to purchase the lightsaber. Traveling to [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] with Vo-Shay, Nyo intended to receive a lightsaber from a dealer he had paid in advance for the weapon. Upon arriving, they discovered that Doune had already arrived ahead of them and stolen the lightsaber.<ref name="TLH" />

Determined to win back the lightsaber, Vo-Shay bet the amulet around his neck, which supposedly granted him his prowess in gambling in exchange for the lightsaber. Purposely throwing the match, Vo-Shay handed over the amulet while Doune handed over the lightsaber, as he claimed he no longer needed it with such a powerful amulet in his possession. As Doune wandered away, Vo-Shay handed the lightsaber over to Nyo and introduced the boy to his real source of luck: the [[Force ghost/Legends|spirit]] of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Aryzah]]. Inviting Nyo to join them aboard Vo-Shay's [[Ashanda Ray|ship]], the three departed the moon to travel the galaxy and study the Force.<ref name="TLH" />
